# v0.1.24

This release fixes npm-based upgrades.

## Fixed

- The npm launcher now checks the installed Python runtime version before starting.
- If `context_kernel.__version__` is older than the npm launcher version, it automatically runs `pip install --user --upgrade akernel-runtime>=<launcher-version>`.
- This prevents users from updating `@context-akernel/akernel` while still launching an older `akernel-runtime`.
